mapper.select:
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(sales_amount), 0) FROM biz_spider_data WHERE DATE(record_date) = CURDATE()
AND branch_id = #{branchId}

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(sales_amount), 0) FROM biz_spider_data WHERE record_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)
AND branch_id = #{branchId}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM biz_employee e LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON e.user_id = u.user_id WHERE e.status = '0'
AND u.dept_id = #{branchId}

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT shop_id) FROM biz_spider_data
branch_id = #{branchId}

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(consultation_count), 0) FROM biz_spider_data WHERE DATE(record_date) = CURDATE()
AND branch_id = #{branchId}

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(consultation_count), 0) FROM biz_spider_data WHERE record_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)
AND branch_id = #{branchId}

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT employee_id) FROM biz_spider_data WHERE DATE(record_date) = CURDATE() AND employee_id IS NOT NULL
AND branch_id = #{branchId}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM biz_spider_data WHERE DATE(record_date) = CURDATE() AND response_rate_3m IS NOT NULL AND response_rate_3m < 50
AND branch_id = #{branchId}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM biz_spider_data WHERE YEAR(record_date) = YEAR(CURDATE()) AND MONTH(record_date) = MONTH(CURDATE()) AND is_abnormal = 1
AND branch_id = #{branchId}
